---
title: |
  ![](logo_retreat.png){width=7cm}  
  <span class="special-font">Retreat GRBIO 2026</span><br>
  1 i 2 de juliol (Vilanova i la Geltrú)
output:
  html_document:
    theme:
      version: 5
    css: styles.css
      
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(prettydoc)
```

------------------------------------------------------------------------

# Contents

The repository contains all the material of the RETREAT 2026 of the [GRBIO](https://grbio.upc.edu/en) research group.

-   You can find the program: [HERE](Programa_XI_GRBIO_RETREAT_2026.pdf)

-   A direct link to the repository web page: [HERE](https://github.com/GRBio/RETREAT2026)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

The folders with the different presentations of the sessions can be found here:

Sessió 1: **Kick-off**

-   Guadalupe Gómez: [Opertura i Presentació del Retreat](01_kick_off/01_RETREAT2025_Presentació_LupeG.pdf)
-   Daniel Fernández: [Twitter, Newsletter i XXSS](01_kick_off/02_RETREAT2025_XXSS_DanielF.pdf)
-   Jordi Cortés: [Contingut Web i Servidors](01_kick_off/03_RETREAT2025_Web_Content_JordiC.pdf)
-   Cristian Tebé: [Seminaris](01_kick_off/04_RETREAT2025_Seminars_CristianT.pdf)
-   Conxita Arenas: [GRBIO Divulga](01_kick_off/05_RETREAT2025_GRBIO_Divulga_ContxitaA.pdf)

Sessió 2: **Archetypes, Archetypoids & Synthetic Data - applications in Sport and Energy**

-   Nora Amama: [Complementary resemblance tests for synthetic data](02_Archetypes/01_GRBIO_retreat_Nora.pdf)
-   Liukuan Yu: [Generating Synthetic Data via Archetypal and Archetypoid Analyses](02_Archetypes/02_GRBIO_retreat_Wellk.pdf)
-   Daniel Fernández: [Identifying Player Prototypes in Basketball using Archetypoid Analysis](02_Archetypes/03_GRBIO_retreat_Dani.pdf)
-   Jordi Cortés: [Future research](02_Archetypes/04_GRBIO_retreat_Jordi.pdf)

Sessió 3: **The Importance of Statistics in Biodiversity and Climate Change**

-   Francesc Oliva: [Differential Network Analysis (DNA): An overview (Antonio Miñarro)](03_Senior_Session/01_GRBIO_retreat_ToniMiñarro.pdf)
-   Sergi Civit: [Assurance and power-like friends in group-sequential designs (Marta Bofill)](03_Senior_Session/02_GRBIO_retreat_Marta.pdf)
-   Conxita Arenas: [The Importance of Statistics in Biodiversity and Climate Change](03_Biodiversity/Presentacio_Conxita_video.mp4)
-   Jordi Ocaña: [Assurance and power-like friends in group-sequential designs (Marta Bofill)](03_Senior_Session/02_GRBIO_retreat_Marta.pdf)


Sessió 4: **Advanced Disease Modeling & Next Generation Clinical Trials**

-   Maria Lee:
-   Pau Esteve:
-   Andrea Toloba:
-   João Carmezim:
-   Santi-Pérez Hoyos:
-   Klaus Langohr: 

Sessió 5: **Taller GRBIO Divulga**

-   [Taller de propostes per al GRBIO Divulga](GRBIO_Divulga.pdf)

Sessió 5: **Activitat lúdica**

------------------------------------------------------------------------

Podreu trobar les imatges de la jornada a la nostra galeria de fotos a la [web](https://grbio.upc.edu/en/test/2025/x-retreat-2025).
